mapper.update:
UPDATE user
account = #{account}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, username = #{username}, bio = #{bio}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, role = #{role},
deleted_at = #{deletedAt},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, rf.file_url AS avatar FROM user u LEFT JOIN resource_file rf ON rf.biz_id = u.id AND rf.biz_type = 'AVATAR' WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
